name: Live Countdown Timer
description: Live JavaScript countdown timer with styled digit blocks in Bangers font. Default target: next Sunday 2pm. Configurable target date via JS. Shows hours, minutes, seconds. Updates every second. Styled with red digit blocks and dark border shadow matching the site's bold visual language.
notes: Self-contained. Drop HTML + script anywhere on page. Change getTargetTime() function to target any future date/time.
